name: Tea Tree Essential Oil
description: A steam-distilled essential oil from Melaleuca alternifolia containing terpinen-4-ol, providing broad-spectrum antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal activity.
appearance: Clear to pale yellow liquid; fresh, camphoraceous, medicinal aroma
solubility: Insoluble in water; miscible with carrier oils and organic solvents
chemistry: Terpinen-4-ol: broad-spectrum antibacterial, antiviral, antifungal. Hundreds of papers.
warnings: Always dilute. Toxic if ingested. Patch test.
shelfLife: 1–2 years after opening; oxidized oil is more allergenic
